== Notes for [[Item:Q103058|Q103058]] ==

Tomas Garcia de Santa Maria was not brother but cousin of Pablo de Santa Maria. He was a physician who resided in Soria and whose jewish name was Todroz Benveniste

Michael Gerli- Medieval Iberia: An Encyclopedia. Pag 355 https://books.google.se/books?id=QlpKAgAAQBAJ&pg=PA355&lpg=PA355&dq=grandson+of+tomas+garcia+de+santa+maria+of+zaragoza&source=bl&ots=sXAO0t3Z_x&sig=ACfU3U0BcqfH1OJWUcsAEaH4J9zV8qs0Ig&hl=en&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwiX6-Xx_N3kAhVRJZoKHblwCXcQ6AEwAHoECAkQAQ#v=onepage&q=grandson%20of%20tomas%20garcia%20de%20santa%20maria%20of%20zaragoza&f=false

Asociación de Archiveros de la Iglesia en España. Congreso. Pag 127 https://books.google.se/books?id=-1NCAQAAIAAJ&q=y+mas+concretamente+al+fisico+zaragozano+Todroz&dq=y+mas+concretamente+al+fisico+zaragozano+Todroz&hl=en&sa=X&ved=0ahUKEwiQ5IuE_t3kAhVEl4sKHdENCEkQ6AEILDAA

Antonio Ubieto Arteta- Aragon en la Edad Media. Pag 93 https://books.google.se/books?id=Gr1mAAAAMAAJ&q=todroz+tomas+garcia+santa+maria&dq=todroz+tomas+garcia+santa+maria&hl=en&sa=X&ved=0ahUKEwj-5Y-ig97kAhXC-ioKHV8XAREQ6AEIOTAC

Encarnacion Marin Padilla- Maestre Pedro de la Cabra Pag. 24 https://books.google.se/books?id=7HYsAAAAMAAJ&dq=tomas+garcia+santa+maria+beatriz+de+la+caballeria&focus=searchwithinvolume&q=Todroz+Bienbenist

Tomas Garcia de Santa Maria's father, Mier Benveniste (mentioned by Cantera Burgos as Pablo de Santa Maria's uncle), was brother of Maria Benveniste, mother of Pablo de Santa Maria.

Norman Roth- Conversos, Inquisiton, and the Expulsion of the Jews from Spain. Pag 147 (last paragraph) https://books.google.se/books?id=nzJ5340UZKMC&pg=PA147&lpg=PA147&dq=Tomas+Garcia+de+Santa+Maria+was+not,+as+Cantera+realized,+a+brother+of+Pablo&source=bl&ots=eo2Tvz-iwF&sig=ACfU3U2HJh_qswUvk2_FPcDzuOgYoX6q-A&hl=en&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwiv867-_t3kAhUjtIsKHfiSD3MQ6AEwAHoECAkQAQ#v=onepage&q=Tomas%20Garcia%20de%20Santa%20Maria%20was%20not%2C%20as%20Cantera%20realized%2C%20a%20brother%20of%20Pablo&f=false

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000042600344310

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
